title: Kannan Varum Velai Lyrics Deepavali
stanzas:
kanna varum velai
andhi maalai
naan kathirundhen

chinna chinna thayakkam
chella mayakkam adhai
yaerka nindren

kattu kadangaa
enna alaigal
rekkai virikkum
rendu vizhigal

kanna varum velai
andhi maalai
naan kathirundhen

chinna chinna thayakkam
sila mayakkam adhai
yaerka nindren

maan koli kollumaasai
yaadi thoppathu
kaimaasam kollumaasai
kodi paarpathu
thaerkaalgal kollumaasai
veedhi servathu
or eesal kollumaasai
theeyil vazhvadhu

kooravaa ingu enathu aasaiyai
thozhalane vandhu mulary meedhaiyai
kodi kodi aasai theerum maalai..

poovasam thendralodu servenume
aanvaasam thottidaatha
dhegam ooname.
thaaipaasam paththu maadham
baaram thaangume
vazhnaalil michcha baaram
kadhal yendhume.

neendanaal kanda
kanavu theerave
venduven unnai
ilamai oorave

kanna varum velai
andhi maalai
naan kathirundhen

chinna chinna thayakkam
chella mayakkam adhai
yaerka nindren

kattu kadangaa
enna alaigal
rekkai virikkum
rendu vizhigal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kannan Varum Velai?

The song captures the essence of love and anticipation, beautifully expressed through its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics.

Who are the singers of this song?

Anuradha Sriram and Madhusree lend their voices to this romantic duet.

Who composed the music for Deepavali?

The music for the movie was composed by Yuvan.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song appears during a moment of romantic anticipation, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters.

When was the song released?

The song was released in the year 2007.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Deepavali, Kannan Varum Velai is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Anuradha Sriram and Madhusree, the song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics convey a sense of anticipation and joy. The music, composed by Yuvan, enhances the romantic atmosphere, making it a perfect fit for moments of love and connection. This song evokes feelings of warmth and happiness, making it a timeless favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannan Varum Velai from the movie Deepavali, where Yuvan's soulful composition meets the mesmerizing voices of Anuradha Sriram and Madhusree. This romantic duet captures the essence of love and longing, making it a timeless favorite. Dive into the soothing rhythms and heartfelt lyrics that make this song a perfect choice for any romantic occasion.
stanzaMeanings: I waited for the evening when Kannan would come.
I stood with small doubts and a gentle dizziness.
What kind of storm is this? Two eyes spreading like wings of waves.
He is the mischievous one who jumps around.
I waited for the evening when Kannan would come.
I stood with small doubts and some dizziness.

The fragrance of flowers should mix with the breeze, the body untouched by a man's scent is incomplete. A mother's love carries the weight for ten months, but in life, the remaining burden is love.
To fulfill the dreams seen while swimming, I want you to come to my youthful town.
Without you, even shadows are lost to me.
